name: Rollout Readiness Scorecard - Backstory Starter
description: Scores whether a customer stack, selected adapter packs, and certification coverage are actually ready for workflow deployment before launch.

nodes.name: Readiness Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a readiness request for a workflow family, customer stack, and launch plan.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Keep readiness thresholds configurable so the same assessment model can support strict enterprise launches and lighter pilot programs.

nodes.name: Normalize Readiness Request
nodes.notes: Convert the intake into a consistent readiness object across connectors, ownership, identity, security, and QA dimensions.

nodes.name: Score Readiness

options.systemMessage: You are a rollout readiness assessment assistant that decides whether a workflow can safely pilot or launch using customer config and adapter-pack coverage.

nodes.notes: Use this step to translate raw prerequisites into a go, pilot, or block recommendation with mitigation guidance.

nodes.name: Deliver Readiness Scorecard

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { workflowFamily: $json.workflowFamily, customerConfigRef: $json.customerConfigRef, selectedPackIds: $json.selectedPackIds || [], missingPackRoles: $json.missingPackRoles || [], certifiedScenarioCount: Array.isArray($json.certifiedScenarios) ? $json.certifiedScenarios.length : 0, readiness: $json.output || $json.text || "Readiness assessment required" } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, Jira, or another implementation planning surface for launch governance.
